title: Resolution Commending and Congratulating Ms. Ella Mae C. Elasigue of Barangay Lalakay, Purok 2, Los Baños, Laguna for Being Crowned As Teen Princess Laguna That Was Held Last May 19, 2019 and As a Teen Princess Philippines Top Model Award Held Last December 15, 2019 at Insular Life Building, Filinvest, Alabang. (AUTHOR: HON. CRIS DAYRIL B. BAGNES, 01/10/2020)
